summary: Completed frontend-only validation for landing, demo auth (referee/manager), schedule request flow, messages, manager tabs/assignments, profile edit, calendar availability dialog, and payments.

issues: Missing data-testid attributes on key interactive elements (login, nav links, tabs, forms), reducing testability and maintainability.

action_items: Add stable data-testid attributes across critical interactive UI elements.
Fix React warning: invalid `dismiss` prop passed to DOM element (toast render path).

Fix React DOM nesting warning in Messages page (`
` rendered inside `

`).
Provide required credential/playbook files expected by test process: /app/memory/test_credentials.md and /app/auth_testing.md.
Align environment/process docs with actual repo structure (frontend/.env path currently not present in this recreated repo).
critical_code_review_comments: Auth/session and role-gated routing worked as expected in tested demo flows.
Requested-assignment persistence works within same browser context and is visible in manager Assignments tab.
Project does not currently satisfy testability guideline requiring data-testid on critical elements.
seed_data_creation: No manual seed created; used built-in demo account/data seeding.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Browser automation contexts are isolated per run. Cross-role persistence checks (referee request -> manager requested badge) must be executed in a single run to validate localStorage-backed flow.
rca of the issue: No core functional blocker found in requested flows. Non-blocking issues are React warnings from UI markup/prop forwarding and missing test instrumentation (data-testid).
test_credentials: Required file /app/memory/test_credentials.md is missing; credentials were taken from review request/demo UI.
mocked_api: MOCKED: Local browser-storage data layer is used instead of original Supabase-backed APIs.
